description: A designed promotional graphic from ICE encouraging illegal aliens to self-deport. The photographic upper two-thirds shows a low-angle, close-up shot of a person in blue jeans and black work boots climbing the metal airstairs (boarding stairs) of an aircraft; a red handrail is visible at left and a red stripe runs along the aircraft fuselage/door. Critically, the person's ankles are bound by a metal chain (ankle shackles) connecting the two boots, evoking a deportee being escorted in restraints. The lower third is overlaid with bold typography: the word 'Leave' set very large in red serif type, followed by 'on your OWN terms.' in black serif (with 'OWN' emphasized), and below in smaller blue all-caps sans-serif: 'AVOID THE JAIL CELL. AVOID THE HUMILIATION.' A dark navy-blue footer bar carries the circular DHS/ICE seal and the 'ICE' wordmark on the left, with white text on the right reading 'Learn more at: ICE.gov/self-deportation'. The propaganda technique combines fear/intimidation imagery (shackles, the implication of arrest and jail) with a framing of choice and dignity ('on your OWN terms') to pressure undocumented immigrants into voluntary departure. The accompanying tweet promises perks for self-deporting: skip the ICE arrest, a free flight home, and a $1,000 stipend. Target audience: undocumented immigrants in the U.S.
notable_text: Leave on your OWN terms. / AVOID THE JAIL CELL. AVOID THE HUMILIATION. / Learn more at: ICE.gov/self-deportation
